item.title: You're Using Your Microwave the Wrong Way
item.description: Discover why placing food closer to the edge of the microwave turntable can help it heat more evenly than placing it in the center.

media:content.media:title: You're Using Your Microwave the Wrong Way
media:content.media:description: Discover why placing food closer to the edge of the microwave turntable can help it heat more evenly than placing it in the center.

item.title: You're Supposed to Fold Coffee Filters
item.description: Discover why folding the edges of a coffee filter before brewing can help it fit better and stay securely in place.

media:content.media:title: You're Supposed to Fold Coffee Filters
media:content.media:description: Discover why folding the edges of a coffee filter before brewing can help it fit better and stay securely in place.

item.title: It's Not Just a Drawer Under Your Oven
item.description: Discover the real purpose of the compartment beneath many ovens and why it may be more useful than you realized.

media:content.media:title: It's Not Just a Drawer Under Your Oven
media:content.media:description: Discover the real purpose of the compartment beneath many ovens and why it may be more useful than you realized.

item.title: You're Wearing Your Travel Pillow Backwards
item.description: Discover why wearing a travel neck pillow in the front can provide better support and a more comfortable resting position during your trip.

media:content.media:title: You're Wearing Your Travel Pillow Backwards
media:content.media:description: Discover why wearing a travel neck pillow in the front can provide better support and a more comfortable resting position during your trip.

item.title: A Simpler Way to Perfectly Crack Eggs
item.description: See how dropping an egg from a short height can create a clean crack, making it easier to open with less mess.

media:content.media:title: A Simpler Way to Perfectly Crack Eggs
media:content.media:description: See how dropping an egg from a short height can create a clean crack, making it easier to open with less mess.

item.title: You're Supposed to Trim Your Broom
item.description: Discover why trimming worn broom bristles can help restore cleaning performance and extend the life of your broom.

media:content.media:title: You're Supposed to Trim Your Broom
media:content.media:description: Discover why trimming worn broom bristles can help restore cleaning performance and extend the life of your broom.

item.title: Make Every Belt Fit You
item.description: Discover a simple adjustment that can help almost any belt fit more comfortably and securely.

media:content.media:title: Make Every Belt Fit You
media:content.media:description: Discover a simple adjustment that can help almost any belt fit more comfortably and securely.

item.title: This Kitchen Staple Has Another Use
item.description: A common household ingredient can help with an unexpected cleanup task. See how it works in this simple demonstration.

item.title: Your Instant Pot Has a Handy Lid Holder
item.description: Discover a built-in Instant Pot feature that lets you rest the lid securely in the handle while cooking, helping keep your workspace tidy.
